# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 19
##### § 509-O — Penalties

Upon conviction for the violation of any provision of this article the court shall impose a sentence consisting of a fine of not less than one hundred dollars nor more than two hundred fifty dollars.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
